name: Málaga Half Marathon
summary: Scenic half marathon along the Málaga coastline and through the historic city center, starting and finishing near Paseo del Parque.
heroNote: Great cheering spots along the Malagueta beachfront promenade, the Paseo Marítimo, and the tree-lined Alameda Principal near the finish.
specialNote: This race uses wave starts, so estimated times may be slightly less accurate.
